positive: A minimalist, abstract illustration of a stylized celestial fox (kitsune), depicted with flowing, ethereal tails and glowing accents. The fox is posed centrally, coiled dynamically, radiating energy. Use a highly contrasting silhouette style, emphasizing deep indigo and violet blues against a stark, vibrant copper-gold background. Incorporate subtle bioluminescent line work and negative space to suggest magic and motion. The overall composition must be clean, graphic, and high-contrast, suitable for large-scale apparel printing. Art Deco fusion style, digital art, vector quality, crisp linework, high detail, maximalism meets minimalism.
